span.p:
Shape pool (ShapeEntry-chain dedup)
ShapeSignature-keyed, cap 64 fields
Data zone (gc_data_zone, variable buffers: items[], map data, closure_env)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
gc_compact_data: copy survivors
rewrite owner pointers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
data nursery (4MB blocks)
bump-allocated, COMPACTED each cycle

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
tenured data
survivors copied here on collect

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Object zone (gc_object_zone)
fixed-size structs, NEVER moved
7 size classes 16..256B + large >256B
String Map Array Element Function boxed-num

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bump region (gc_heap_bump_alloc)
JIT hot path, 4MB..64MB doubling blocks
GC_FLAG_BUMP, recycled via free lists

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Large objects (>256B)
malloc'd, sorted large_objects[] for ownership

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
root Item stack
precise live slice scanned by GC

span.p:
raw number stack
int64 / double / DateTime
watermark restored at frame exit
